title: New Mexico using AI to implement Medicaid work requirements under federal law
description: New Mexico is one of only six states already using artificial intelligence to process Medicaid work requirement documentation ahead of the Jan. 1, 2027, federal deadline. State officials say AI will assist caseworkers but not make eligibility decisions.
content:
New Mexico is one of six states that has already begun using artificial intelligence to comply with a major Medicaid overhaul contained in the “One Big Beautiful Bill Act” that President Donald Trump signed last year.
That’s according to a study from... [2642 chars]

title: Elon Musk Loses $150 Billion Suit Against OpenAI and Sam Altman
description: A nine-member jury found that Mr. Musk had waited too long to sue. The setback for the tech mogul frees OpenAI to continue in the artificial intelligence race.
content:
Elon Musk’s $150 billion lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman was quickly rejected by a federal jury on Monday, in a major blow to Mr. Musk’s credibility and his effort to become a serious competitor in the artificial intelligence race.

title: AI Triggers Controversial Commencement Season
description: The mere mention of artificial intelligence or some other hot-button topics has led students to jeer speakers at graduation ceremonies across the country.
content:
Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt was almost apologetic as he addressed the transformative impact of artificial intelligence in front of the University of Arizona’s graduating class.

title: Cuban: Crypto Industry Finally Wants Regulation
description: Billionaire investor Mark Cuban is pointing to the cryptocurrency industry's dramatic pivot on government regulation to defend his controversial new proposal for a federal tax on artificial intelligence.
content:
